title: The Expedition to Dhu Qarad
description: According to Ibn Humayd-Salamah-Muhammad b. Isbaq'A§im b. 'Umar b. Qatadah, 'Abdallah b. AN Bakr, and someone whom I do not doubt-'Ubaydallah b. Ka'b b. Malik (each of whom transmitted part of the report about the expedition to Dhu Qarad): The first person to know about them190 was Salamah b. z86. Yaqut, Mu'fam al-bulddn, VI, 173-74, locates 'Usfan at two stages or 33 Arab miles from Mecca on the road to Medina.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
